title: Design a Message Queue
input_format: Messages from producers to specific topics
output_format: Messages delivered to multiple consumers or consumer groups
constraints: Strict ordering within partitions. Durability through replication. Support multiple consumer groups for a single topic. Scalable to millions of messages per second.
function_signature: class MessageQueue { createTopic(name: string, partitions: number): void; produce(topic: string, message: Message): void; consume(topic: string, groupId: string): Message[]; }
